titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University. Vice President for Research and Advanced Studies records4-5-1243
titlestmt.author: Compiled by L. Stowe

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University. Vice President for Research and Advanced Studies records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Vice President for Research and Advanced Studies

did.abstract: Includes records concerning research and research proposals in various academic departments and study centers at Cornell University, including the Center for International Studies, the Center for Radiophysics and Space Research, and others; includes files of Franklin A. Long.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes records concerning research and research proposals in various academic departments and study centers at Cornell University, including the Center for International Studies, the Center for Radiophysics and Space Research, and others; includes files of Franklin A. Long.

Also, the records of the Assistant Vice President for Research and Outreach, Lucinda Noble. They include correspondence, reports, minutes, publications and subject files. This office existed from 1994-1998 with Norman Scott as the Director.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Vice President for Research and Advanced Studies records, #4-5-1243. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin except for Box 8.
